_publications._publicationTitle: Systems Biology Approaches Reveal Potential Phenotype-Modifier Genes in Neurofibromatosis Type 1.

_contextSnippet: To assemble a network of the ontologies' selected genes, we used the STRING tool, observing protein–protein interactions (PPI) that were previously described by experimental assays.
details: Successfully assembled protein-protein interaction networks for GO and HPO gene sets, with combined network comprising NF1 direct interactions
